# cairn vault add

Register a vault in the registry

## Help

```text
Register a vault in the registry

Usage: add [OPTIONS] --name <NAME> <PATH>

Arguments:
  <PATH>
          Filesystem path to the vault root

Options:
      --name <NAME>
          Short identifier for the vault

      --label <LABEL>
          Human-readable description

      --json
          Emit JSON output

  -h, --help
          Print help
```
